aliases: MatterID and ExportID concatenation separated by '#' (used only for playbook) such: <Matter_ID>
description: There is no context output for this command.
examples:
Command Example
!gvault-download-results bucketName=85d7cacf-5d93-44e5-8d37-4ba6da342d02 downloadID=0bebe0ec-ee41-4955-96b3-20d9408409c8/exportly-7b8ae442-bee7-4bc9-89fa-a65c6c24d50c/drive_test_exportcK29253Af6_0.zip
Human Readable Output
15. Get the results of a Drive export
Get the results of a specified drive export.
Base Command
gvault-get-drive-results
Input

!gvault-download-results bucketName=85d7cacf-5d93-44e5-8d37-4ba6da342d02 downloadID=0bebe0ec-ee41-4955-96b3-20d9408409c8/exportly-7b8ae442-bee7-4bc9-89fa-a65c6c24d50c/drive_test_exportcK29253Af6_0.zip

15. Get the results of a Drive export

Argument Name
name: gvault-get-drive-results

outputs.description: Title of the file GoogleVault.Matter.Export.Results.Author Author of the file

outputs.description: Other users related to the file GoogleVault.Matter.Export.Results.Viewers Viewers of the file
